title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Questions on language identity and technology.

questions.question: Will real-time translation technology make learning languages unnecessary?
Is it a problem that many smaller languages are disappearing?

script.text: Will real-time translation technology make learning languages unnecessary?
Is it a problem that many smaller languages are disappearing?
Do you think a person can truly understand a culture without speaking its language?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
